com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl - module com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl
CIA (Citizen Intelligence Agency) Data Service Implementation Module.
com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl - package com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl
This package provides the implementation of data access objects (DAOs) and services for the application.
com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl.export - package com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl.export
JSON export data transfer objects for intelligence products.
com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl.util - package com.hack23.cia.service.data.impl.util
This package provides utility classes for data access and management.
